topic: Cancer immunotherapy: how T-cells learn to fight tumors
caption: Did you know your immune system can be trained to fight cancer? 🌟 T-cells are the soldiers of our immune system, and with immunotherapy, they can learn to recognize and attack tumor cells. 💡 Here are the basics of how it works: T-cells are extracted from the patient, then genetically modified to produce receptors that recognize cancer cells. Once re-infused, these modified T-cells can seek out and destroy cancer cells. 🔬 But how does it work in practice? And what are the benefits and risks? Save this for a deeper dive into the science of cancer immunotherapy. Share with someone who's been affected by cancer. Follow @healthrecode for daily updates on medical breakthroughs. Don't forget to stay informed — your health is worth it! 💕 #cancerimmunotherapy #tcells #immunesystem #cancerresearch #healthrecode #medicalbreakthroughs #immunotherapy
